description_long: This is a discarded Pepsi can, cylindrical in shape with a slightly indented top and bottom. The can is predominantly blue with the iconic Pepsi logo, which features a red, white, and blue circular emblem and bold white 'PEPSI' text. Nutritional information, recycling instructions, and a barcode are visible on the side, along with additional product details and branding. The surface appears metallic and glossy, reflecting light, and the can is likely made of lightweight aluminum. The top of the can features a standard silver pull tab, typical of beverage cans. There are no visible dents, rust, or damage marks, and the can appears empty.
description: A glossy blue Pepsi can with prominent branding, nutritional info, and a standard pull tab. The can is undamaged and made of lightweight aluminum.
description_view_0: This view shows the nutrition facts, recycling instructions, and part of the Pepsi logo on the blue can.
description_view_1: This view highlights the back of the can with the barcode, partial logo, and 'Best Taste' slogan.
description_view_2: This view displays the large, bold 'PEPSI' text and the circular red, white, and blue logo.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the nutrition facts panel and the upper portion of the Pepsi logo.
attribute_brand_logo: The can features the Pepsi logo: a circular emblem with red, white, and blue waves, and bold white 'PEPSI' text.
